clipboard.invalidUrl: Clipboard content is not a valid URL

tray.quitConfirmContent: There are active downloads. Exiting will interrupt all downloads. Are you sure you want to exit?

home.slogan: Paste a video link, download instantly
tips: Having download issues? Go to Settings to configure cookies or update yt-dlp
Supports thousands of websites including YouTube, Bilibili, Twitter, etc.
Choose video-only or audio-only mode to download as needed
Make sure to set a download directory before downloading
Installing Deno runtime is recommended for YouTube to get full format list
Use keyboard Up/Down keys to browse parse history

downloads.fileDeletedOrMoved: The file has been deleted or moved. Remove this record from the list?
downloads.confirmPause: Are you sure you want to pause the current download?
downloads.confirmCancelAndDelete: Are you sure you want to cancel the download and delete the downloaded files? This action cannot be undone.
downloads.confirmRemoveTask: Are you sure you want to remove this task from the list?
downloads.confirmClearCompleted: Are you sure you want to clear all completed/failed/cancelled tasks?

settings.title: Settings
settings.ytdlpDesc: Core tool required for this application
settings.denoDesc: YouTube requires a JavaScript runtime to parse video info. Some formats may be missing or unavailable without it
settings.aboutDesc: A yt-dlp GUI built with Tauri 2 + Vue 3 + Naive UI
settings.appIsLatest: You are on the latest version

detail.setDownloadDirFirst: Please set a download directory first
detail.endTimeAdjusted: End time cannot be earlier than or equal to start time, auto-adjusted
detail.noSubtitles: No subtitles available for this video

cookie.desc: Some videos require login to download. Use cookies for authentication
cookie.browserDesc: Automatically read cookies from selected browser. Close the browser before use
cookie.verificationDesc: The target website requires login. Please configure cookies and try again

toolbox.thumbnailDesc: Extract video thumbnails and save as JPG
toolbox.livechatDesc: Get live stream replay chat / bullet screen data
toolbox.subtitlesPageDesc: Get all subtitle tracks, save as local files after selecting format. Supports bilingual synthesis
toolbox.bilingualDesc: Select two languages to synthesize bilingual subtitle file (primary above, secondary below)
toolbox.selectBothLangs: Please select both primary and secondary language
toolbox.langsCantBeSame: Primary and secondary language cannot be the same
toolbox.cantFindSubtitles: Cannot find subtitles for the selected language
toolbox.noSubtitleUrl: No available subtitle download URL found
toolbox.thumbnailPageDesc: Get all video thumbnails, save as local files after selecting resolution
toolbox.livechatPageDesc: Get all live stream replay chat data. Supports filtering fields and export as JSON or CSV
toolbox.selectAtLeastOneField: Please select at least one export field

plugins.title: Plugin Manager
plugins.desc: Manage yt-dlp plugins to extend functionality
plugins.pageDesc: Install yt-dlp plugins to extend functionality. Plugins take effect automatically after installation.
plugins.cookieUnlockDesc: Unlock Chromium browser cookie database, allowing cookie access without closing the browser

errors.unsupportedUrl: This platform is not supported. Please check the URL
errors.videoUnavailable: Video unavailable. It may have been deleted or set to private
errors.privateVideo: This is a private video. Login required to access
errors.http403: Access denied (403). May need to configure cookies or proxy
errors.http404: Resource not found (404). Please check the URL
errors.http429: Too many requests (429). Please try again later
errors.cookieDatabaseLocked: Cannot read browser cookie database. Please close the browser and try again
errors.cannotDownload: Cannot access page. Please check network or proxy settings
errors.networkError: Network connection failed. Please check network or proxy settings
errors.err_ytdlp_not_installed: yt-dlp is not installed. Please download it in Settings
errors.err_app_data_dir: Failed to get app data directory
errors.err_livechat_not_found: Live chat data not found. This video may not have live chat
errors.err_read_livechat: Failed to read live chat file

setup.ytdlpDesc: yt-dlp is the core download engine for this application and is not currently installed. Without it, no videos can be parsed or downloaded.
setup.ytdlpHint: Go to Settings and click the download button to automatically install yt-dlp. Once installed, all features will be available.
setup.denoDesc: You are downloading a YouTube video, but Deno JS runtime is not installed. Some video formats may be missing or unavailable without it.
setup.denoHint: Deno is a JavaScript runtime required by yt-dlp to parse YouTube video info. Installing it enables the full format list, including higher quality options.
